description:
Parent epic: V3 E4: Actions and tools

Source task 2/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify action schemas, descriptions, names, and generated tool metadata.

Epic closure criteria:
- the public DSL reads as actions/capabilities, not plumbing
- all operation surfaces have consistent validation and inspection
- tests cover duplicate/invalid operation registration

comments.text: Strengthened action metadata tests: action name/description, Zoi schema presence, provider tool JSON Schema fields, and generated agent tool metadata are now asserted explicitly.

title: E4: Verify action schemas, descriptions, names, and generated tool metadata
